info.title: e-mam API
info.description: Islamic platform API — real-time khutbah transcription & translation, live Qari voice synthesis, Zakat calculator, and prayer times by location.

get.description: Serve the main frontend HTML.

Paginated khutbah summaries for the signed-in user (newest first).
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <Firebase ID token>`.

parameters.name: include_transcript

schema.description: If false, omits full `khutbah` text per item (lighter list).
schema.title: Include Transcript

parameters.description: If false, omits full `khutbah` text per item (lighter list).

get.description: Return this user's fixed preset Qari voice (assigned on first call). Requires Firebase Bearer token.
Browser demo for Live Recitation (imam audio while you speak).
List allowed reciter edition ids for Live mode.
Return this user's preferred reciter (falls back to server default).

put.description: Save preferred reciter on the user's Firestore profile.

get.description: Browser demo for Arabic Language Tutor (Ustadha Layla).

Session metadata for the Arabic tutor. The OpenAI API key stays server-side;
clients connect via the proxied WebSocket at ``ws_path``.

post.description:
Issue a short-lived OpenAI Realtime client secret (GA ``POST /v1/realtime/client_secrets``).

Use for direct WebRTC/WebSocket clients; the main API key is never exposed.

get.description: Browser demo: mic → tracking debug → paced licensed reciter playback.

post.description:
Calculate Zakat based on assets, liabilities, and chosen Nisab standard.

**Metal prices:** Send `gold_price_per_gram` and `silver_price_per_gram` in the request
currency, or omit **both** to load spot XAU/XAG via MetalpriceAPI (same as
`GET /zakat/nisab/current`; requires `METALPRICE_API_KEY`).

**Rules implemented:**
- 2.5 % rate on net zakatable wealth
- Nisab: 85 g gold (Hanafi) OR 595 g silver (other madhabs)
- Hawl: must own above Nisab for one lunar year (354 days)
- Only immediate liabilities (due within 12 months) are deducted

get.description:
Return Nisab thresholds for gold (85 g) and silver (595 g) standards.

By default, spot prices are loaded from MetalpriceAPI (set `METALPRICE_API_KEY` in the
server environment). Optional `gold_price` and `silver_price` are per-gram overrides for
manual entry or testing; if one is set, both must be set.
Educational reference for Zakat fiqh rules.

post.description: Sample request body and expected result for testing.

get.description:
Return all upcoming Islamic events sorted by days remaining.

Each event includes:
- Hijri and Gregorian dates
- Days remaining countdown
- Whether the event is today

Return Islamic events happening **today**.

Returns an empty list if no event falls on today's date.

Return detailed information about a specific Islamic event.

**Available slugs:**
`islamic-new-year` · `ashura` · `mawlid-al-nabi` · `shab-e-barat`
· `ramadan` · `laylat-al-qadr` · `eid-ul-fitr` · `eid-ul-adha`

When `include_story=true`, AI-generated content is added:
- Historical significance
- Related Quranic verse (Arabic + translation)
- Relevant Hadith (Arabic + translation)
- Personal reflection
- Recommended acts of worship

parameters.name: lang

schema.description: Language code for AI content (en, ar, bn, etc.)
schema.title: Lang

parameters.description: Language code for AI content (en, ar, bn, etc.)

get.description:
Convert a date between **Hijri** and **Gregorian** calendars.

**Examples:**
- Hijri → Gregorian: `?year=1446&month=9&day=1&to=gregorian`
- Gregorian → Hijri: `?year=2025&month=3&day=1&to=hijri`

Profile dashboard: prayers tracked, khutbahs AI count, and Qari tajweed score.

**tajweed_score** — running average (0–100) from Qari recitations: 100 when an ayah has
no corrections; −10 per correction (minimum 50 per ayah). Updates each time `/ws/qari`
identifies an ayah.

delete.description:
Permanently delete the authenticated user's account and all related data:

- Firestore `users/{uid}` profile (Qari voice, stats, location, …)
- Subcollections: Quran bookmarks, reading progress, prayer tracker, khutbah summaries
- Dua board posts by this user (+ ameens on those posts)
- This user's ameen clicks on others' posts
- Dua post quota doc, dhikr daily session docs
- Firebase Authentication user record

**Irreversible.** Requires a valid Firebase ID token for the account being deleted.

post.summary: Prayer times for a location (JSON body)
post.description:
## Mobile integration

**No query parameters** — send a JSON body only (`Content-Type: application/json`).

### Getting latitude & longitude

1. Request **location permission** in the app (required on both platforms).
2. Read **one fix** (GPS or network); optional: refresh when the user moves significantly.
3. Send **decimal degrees** (WGS84), same as Core Location / Android `Location` APIs.

| Platform | Typical API |
|----------|-------------|
| **iOS** | `CLLocationManager` → `CLLocation.coordinate.latitude` / `longitude`. Add `NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription` (or always) in `Info.plist`. |
| **Android** | `FusedLocationProviderClient.getCurrentLocation` / `lastLocation`, or `LocationManager`. Use `ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION` (or coarse). |

### `date` field

Send **`date`** as the user’s **local Gregorian day** for the prayer table (ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`).
If you omit it, the server uses **its** calendar date, which can be wrong near midnight in other timezones.

### Calculation settings

Optional **`method`** and **`school`** follow [Aladhan](https://aladhan.com/rest-api). Omit both to use their default.

### Jamaat (congregation / iqama)

Aladhan only returns **adhan** times. The API adds **`jamaat`**: clock times computed as **adhan + minutes**, using optional **`jamaat_offsets_minutes`** (`fajr`, `dhuhr`, `asr`, `maghrib`, `isha` — each 0–180). Omitted keys use server defaults (20/20/20/10/15). Omit the whole field to use defaults only. **`jamaat_note`** explains that mosques should still be confirmed.

### Caching & limits

Responses are cached in **Redis** per location/day/settings (`PRAYER_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS`, `PRAYER_TIMES_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX`). Check response header **`X-Cache`**: `HIT` or `MISS`.
Rate limit: configurable via `PRAYER_TIMES_RATE_LIMIT` (default **30/minute** per client IP).

200.description: Normalized timings and metadata (sourced from Aladhan).

post.summary: Sahri & Iftar calendar for a location (month or year)
post.description:
## Sahri & Iftar — month or year calendar

Returns sehri/iftar times for the given coordinates via one Aladhan calendar fetch.

**Body:** `latitude`, `longitude`, optional `range`, `year`, `month`, `method`, `school`, `adjustment`.

| `range` | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| **`month`** (default) | One Gregorian month. Set optional `month` (1–12); defaults to current month. Response: flat **`days[]`**. |
| **`year`** | All 12 months. `month` is ignored. Response: nested **`months[]`**, each with its own `days[]`. |

**Mobile:** Ramadan UI → `range: "month"`. Full-year offline cache → `range: "year"`. Today's countdown → **POST /prayer/sahri-iftar**.

Cached in Redis per location/range/settings (`X-Cache`: `HIT` / `MISS`). Same rate limit as other prayer routes.

200.description: Gregorian month or year of sehri/iftar times (Aladhan calendar API).

post.summary: Sahri last time and Iftar for a location
post.description:
## Sahri & Iftar (Ramadan)

Same JSON body as **POST /prayer/times** (`latitude`, `longitude`, optional `date`, `method`, `school`, `adjustment`).
**No** `jamaat_offsets_minutes` — only fasting windows.

| Field | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| **sahri_last_time** | Stop eating before this time. Uses **Imsak** from [Aladhan](https://aladhan.com/prayer-times-api) when present, else **Fajr**. |
| **iftar_time** | **Maghrib** adhan — break fast. |

Send **`date`** as the user's local Gregorian day (especially near midnight). Cached in Redis with prayer times (`X-Cache`: `HIT` / `MISS`).

For a **full month** (Ramadan table, offline cache), use **POST /prayer/sahri-iftar/calendar** instead.

get.description:
Daily prayer checklist for the signed-in user (5 fard prayers).

Send the user's **local** `date` so the checklist matches their day near midnight.

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Client-local day (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to server calendar today if omitted.
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Client-local day (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to server calendar today if omitted.

post.description:
Mark one prayer done or not done for a given day.

Prefer sending explicit `completed: true` or `false` from the app (clear, idempotent).
Omit `completed` to flip the current state (convenience for a single tap).

get.description:
All-time total prayers marked complete for this user (across every day).

  Increments when a prayer is checked off; decrements if the user unchecks it.
Stored on the user profile since first use of the tracker.
Static list of trackable prayer ids and display names (for UI).

Global recitation total for the current Asia/Dubai calendar day (new doc each day).

Always includes `recent_contributors` (up to 3 profile strips for the latest signed-in
contributors today; `photo_url` comes from the Firebase `picture` claim when present).

Without auth: `global_today_total`, `date_dubai`, and `recent_contributors` only.

With a valid Firebase Bearer token: also `user_today_count` and `session_goal` for that user today.

post.description:
Increment today's global total for everyone.

Optional `Authorization: Bearer <Firebase ID token>`: also increments that user's daily
`session_count` (and optional `session_goal`) in the same Firestore transaction, and
refreshes that user in `recent_contributors` on the global daily doc (max 3, most recent first).

AI-powered Dua Assistant — describe your situation and receive relevant duas.

**Examples:**
- *"I'm feeling anxious about my exam tomorrow"*
- *"I can't sleep and my mind won't stop racing"*
- *"I'm travelling to another country next week"*
- *"I've been ill for days and need comfort"*

Returns duas with Arabic text, transliteration, translation, and hadith source.

Streaming dua assistant (SSE).

Events: `retrieval` (RAG sources) → `delta` (JSON tokens) → `complete` (validated payload).

get.description:
Return all available dua categories.

**Available categories:**
Morning & Evening · Anxiety & Stress · Exams & Difficulty · Travel
· Eating & Drinking · Sleeping & Waking · Illness & Healing · Forgiveness
· Gratitude · Rain & Weather · Entering & Leaving Home · Wedding · Grief & Loss · Protection

Return duas for a specific category with Arabic text, transliteration, and translation.

**Available slugs:**
`morning-evening` · `anxiety-stress` · `exam-difficulty` · `travel`
· `eating-drinking` · `sleeping-waking` · `illness` · `forgiveness`
· `gratitude` · `rain-weather` · `entering-leaving` · `wedding` · `grief-loss` · `protection`
Streaming category duas (SSE). Same events as POST /dua/ask/stream.

post.description:
Deep analysis of a single Arabic word from the Quran.

**What you get:**
- Root letters (e.g. ر-ح-م for رحمن) + core meaning of that root
- All significant words derived from the same root
- Grammar: part of speech, form, case, tense, gender, number
- Multiple meanings (primary and secondary)
- 2-4 Quranic verses where this word appears
- Tafsir commentary from classical scholars

**Example words to try:** `الرحمن` · `الصلاة` · `الجنة` · `الكتاب` · `التوبة`

Full analysis of a Quranic verse.

**What you get:**
- Full transliteration and translation
- Word-by-word breakdown — every word with root, meaning, and grammar
- Theme and broader context within the Surah
- Classical tafsir commentary (Ibn Kathir / Al-Tabari style)
- Key spiritual lessons

**Example verses to try:**
- `بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ` (Al-Fatiha 1:1)
- `اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ` (Ayat al-Kursi — Al-Baqarah 2:255)

Explore all Quranic words derived from a given Arabic root.

**What you get:**
- Core semantic meaning of the root
- All major derivatives (nouns, verbs, participles, masdars)
- Grammatical form of each derivative
- Example verse for each derivative
- How many times the root appears in the Quran
- Theological/linguistic significance of this root

**Classic roots to explore:**
- `ر-ح-م` (mercy) → رحمة، رحيم، رحمن
- `ك-ت-ب` (writing) → كتاب، كتب، كاتب
- `ع-ل-م` (knowledge) → علم، عالم، معلم
- `ص-ل-ح` (righteousness) → صالح، إصلاح، مصلحة

get.description:
Return all 114 Quranic surahs with name, Arabic name, meaning, verse count,
and Meccan/Medinan classification.

Return metadata for a specific Surah by its number (1–114).

**Examples:** `1` = Al-Fatihah · `2` = Al-Baqarah · `36` = Ya-Sin · `114` = An-Nas

Client cache / sync hint for bundled Quran reader payloads (alquran.cloud shape, reciters, etc.).
Bump `data_version` when the reader contract or upstream mapping changes.

Full surah reader payload: Arabic (Uthmani), English meaning, metadata, audio URLs per reciter,
and per-user `isBookmarked` when a valid Firebase Bearer token is sent.

Data is sourced from **https://api.alquran.cloud**.

**Caching:** Assembled surah data (translation + reciters + surah list) is stored in **Redis**
(`QURAN_READER_*` env vars). Cached entries omit user-specific bookmark state; with a Bearer token,
`isBookmarked` is always resolved from Firestore on each request.

**Auth:** Optional. Without `Authorization`, every ayah has `isBookmarked: false`.
With Bearer token, bookmarks are loaded from Firestore.

schema.description: Optional comma-separated surah numbers (1–114), or the single value `all` for every surah. Omit for all 114 surahs.

schema.description: alquran.cloud translation edition id (e.g. en.sahih, en.pickthall).

get.description:
Per-user Quran reading progress for all 114 surahs.

Each surah includes `read_count`, `total_ayahs`, `percent` (0–100), and `completed`.
Progress is updated automatically when Qari identifies an ayah during `/ws/qari`.

get.description:
List the authenticated user's bookmarked ayahs (newest first).

Stored in Firestore: `users/{uid}/quran_ayah_bookmarks/{globalAyahNumber}`.
Each item includes `globalAyahNumber`, surah/ayah metadata, and `bookmarkedAt`.

post.description:
Toggle bookmark for one global ayah for the authenticated user (Firestore:
`users/{uid}/quran_ayah_bookmarks/{globalAyahNumber}`).

**Redis:** The reader payload cache is **bookmark-agnostic**; `isBookmarked` is applied on each
`GET /quran/reader/surahs` from Firestore. No cache invalidation is required when toggling bookmarks.

cannot each generate a different random ayah.

value.title: Value
value.description: Current market value in your currency

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional coarse location on this post only (e.g. city, country). Omit, null, or empty → stored as ANONYMOUS.

session_goal.title: Session Goal
session_goal.description: Only used with a valid Bearer token: optional session target for today on the user's daily doc.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Decimal degrees (WGS84), from device GPS/network location.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Decimal degrees (WGS84), from device GPS/network location.

date.title: Date
date.description: Gregorian date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the timetable. Omit only if server "today" is acceptable.

method.title: Method
method.description: Aladhan calculation method id (e.g. 2 ISNA, 3 MWL). Omit for API default.

jamaat_offsets_minutes.title: Jamaat Offsets Minutes
jamaat_offsets_minutes.description: Optional minutes after each **adhan** time for approximate **jamaat (iqama)**. Keys: fajr, dhuhr, asr, maghrib, isha (subset allowed). Omitted keys use server defaults. Omit the whole field to use defaults only (20/20/20/10/15 minutes).

PrayerTimesRequest.title: PrayerTimesRequest
PrayerTimesRequest.description:
Mobile clients obtain `latitude` / `longitude` from the **device location APIs**
after the user grants permission, then POST this body (no query string).

**iOS:** `CLLocationManager` / `CLLocation` (Core Location). Declare usage in
`Info.plist` (e.g. `NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription`). Read
`location.coordinate.latitude` / `longitude`.

**Android:** `FusedLocationProviderClient` (Play services) or `LocationManager`.
Request `ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION` (or coarse), then read `Location.getLatitude()` /
`getLongitude()`.

Prefer sending **`date`** as the user's **local calendar day** for which they
want prayer times; if omitted, the server uses its own "today" (may not match
the user's timezone near midnight).

jamaat.title: Jamaat
jamaat.description: Approximate jamaat (iqama) clock times, derived from timings + offsets.

jamaat_offsets_applied.title: Jamaat Offsets Applied
jamaat_offsets_applied.description: Minutes after adhan used for each prayer in jamaat (defaults merged with request).

jamaat_note.title: Jamaat Note
jamaat_note.description: Jamaat is not from the prayer API: it is estimated from adhan + offsets; confirm with your mosque.

PrayerTimesResponse.title: PrayerTimesResponse
PrayerTimesResponse.description: Stable JSON shape returned by POST /prayer/times.

date.title: Date
date.description: Client-local calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD) for this checklist.

prayer.title: Prayer
prayer.description: One of: fajr, dhuhr, asr, maghrib, isha.

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: true = mark done, false = mark not done. Omit to toggle the current state.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: One of: harassment, hate, inappropriate, other, spam

range.title: Range
range.description: `month` — one Gregorian month (default). `year` — all 12 months in one response.

year.title: Year
year.description: Gregorian calendar year. Defaults to the server's current year.

month.title: Month
month.description: Gregorian month (1–12). Used only when `range` is `month`; defaults to current month.

method.title: Method
method.description: Aladhan calculation method id (e.g. 2 ISNA, 3 MWL). Omit for API default.

SahriIftarCalendarRequest.title: SahriIftarCalendarRequest
SahriIftarCalendarRequest.description: Gregorian month or year calendar of sehri/iftar windows for a location (Aladhan calendar API).

days.title: Days
days.description: All days in the month when `range` is `month`.

day_count.title: Day Count
day_count.description: Total days in the response (28–31 for month, ~365 for year).

SahriIftarCalendarResponse.title: SahriIftarCalendarResponse
SahriIftarCalendarResponse.description: Gregorian month or year of sehri/iftar times for a location.

sahri_last_time.title: Sahri Last Time
sahri_last_time.description: Last time to finish sehri (Imsak when available, else Fajr). HH:MM local.

iftar_time.title: Iftar Time
iftar_time.description: Iftar at Maghrib adhan. HH:MM local.

imsak.title: Imsak
imsak.description: Imsak when returned by Aladhan for this method (often before Fajr).

SahriIftarDayOut.title: SahriIftarDayOut
SahriIftarDayOut.description: One day in a sehri/iftar month calendar.

day_count.title: Day Count
day_count.description: Number of days in this month (28–31).

SahriIftarMonthOut.title: SahriIftarMonthOut
SahriIftarMonthOut.description: One month inside a yearly sehri/iftar calendar.

sahri_last_time.title: Sahri Last Time
sahri_last_time.description: Last time to finish sehri (Imsak when available, else Fajr). HH:MM local.

iftar_time.title: Iftar Time
iftar_time.description: Iftar at Maghrib adhan. HH:MM local.

imsak.title: Imsak
imsak.description: Imsak when returned by Aladhan for this method (often before Fajr).

SahriIftarResponse.title: SahriIftarResponse
SahriIftarResponse.description: Ramadan sahri (sehri) deadline and iftar for a location — sourced from Aladhan.

globalAyahNumber.title: Globalayahnumber
globalAyahNumber.description: Global ayah index in the standard Mushaf ordering (1–6236).

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Optional: Surah name and verse number (e.g. 'Al-Fatiha 1:1')

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional: the full verse this word appears in, for better contextual analysis

lang.title: Lang
lang.description: Response language code (en, ar, bn, etc.)

metal_standard.description: Gold (85 g) or Silver (595 g) standard for Nisab

gold_price_per_gram.title: Gold Price Per Gram
gold_price_per_gram.description: Gold per gram in `currency`. Omit together with silver to use live spot (server METALPRICE_API_KEY).

silver_price_per_gram.title: Silver Price Per Gram
silver_price_per_gram.description: Silver per gram in `currency`. Omit together with gold to use live spot.

hawl_completed.title: Hawl Completed
hawl_completed.description: Has one lunar year passed since owning Nisab?

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: 30d = temporary posting ban (default 30 days); permanent = no posting
